title: Immersive Interfaces - Watut Mod Support
description: Addon for Immersive Interfaces Resource Pack, that adds Watut mod compatibility.
body: This is a simple addon for [Shrimp's Immersive Interfaces](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shrimps-immersive-interfaces) Resource Pack, which adds support for [What Are They Up To](https://modrinth.com/mod/what-are-they-up-to) mod.
